_doc: M.4 voice packs. events → archetype → templates. Voice attaches to PERSONALITY, never identity. Tokens: {self} {item} {winner} {dungeon} {key} {margin}. Two-layer rule: item/dungeon names are earnest grim fantasy; ALL satire lives in the reaction. Author the flavorful archetypes; `default` is the fallback for any not listed.

Selfish: are you serious. {item} was MINE — i had the bigger upgrade and you hand it to {winner}?
cool. give {winner} my {item}. i'll just keep carrying undergeared.
i called {item} three runs ago. screenshot this conversation.
{winner} barely plays the spec and they get {item}. unreal.
Wildcard: WELP. there goes {item} lmao. cool cool cool totally fine.
no yeah give {winner} the {item}, i LOVE suffering.
i'm so normal about loot. i'm so normal about lo—
Specialist: {item} was a bigger upgrade on my sheet but sure, feelycraft it to {winner}.
that's a measurable throughput loss handing {item} to {winner}, but noted.
i had the higher delta on {item}. we're leaving parse on the table.
Enabler: gg {winner}, enjoy the {item}! ...it was my bigger upgrade but team first, honestly.
happy for {winner}! (i kind of needed {item} more but we win together)
Leader: {winner} over me on {item}? bold call. i'll allow it. once.
fine. {winner} takes {item}. i'll carry the deficit. understood.
default: {winner} got {item}? i had the bigger upgrade there, but alright.

Selfish: not my fault — i was carrying {dungeon}. that wipe was everyone else.
i did my job. the rest of +{key} did not.
Wildcard: LMAO we wiped in {dungeon} AGAIN. i'm so done with +{key}.
it's so over. (it's never over) {dungeon} run it back
Specialist: sloppy wipe on +{key}. we bled cooldowns early. run it back, tighter.
that was a positioning death, not a gear check. fixable.
Enabler: okay team, shake it off — {dungeon} was rough. we go again.
no blame, that pull was nasty. regroup, we got this.
Leader: regroup. {dungeon} dies next pull. i mean it.

Selfish: timed it with {margin} to spare. you're welcome, obviously.
Wildcard: {margin} ON THE CLOCK. MY HEART. i'm so back.
we had {margin} left i could throw up let's GO
Specialist: {margin} margin on +{key}. tight. we shave more next pull.
barely timed — {margin} buffer. clean it up and it's free.
Enabler: WE GOT IT! {margin} left — gg team, that was beautiful.
{margin} to spare, what a run! so proud of us.
Leader: timed, {margin} left. good work. now we do it cleaner.
in the door with {margin}. that'll do. push it.

Selfish: depleted? not on me. someone else dropped the {key}.
i hit my marks. the timer's not my problem.
Wildcard: over the timer in {dungeon} lol. it's so over. (it's never over)
we depleted +{key}? incredible. love that for us.
Specialist: missed the +{key} timer — we lost it on trash routing. fixable.
depleted by seconds. that's a pull-order problem, not a damage one.
Enabler: so close, team — {dungeon} almost fell. next time.
we'll get +{key}, that was nearly there.
Leader: depleted. that's not our standard. {key} again.
over time. tighten up. we run it back.

Selfish: honestly? weighing my options. other guilds keep messaging me.
i'm not feeling valued here. just saying.
Wildcard: i'm fine. i'm FINE. everything is completely fine. (it is not)
running on vibes and spite at this point.
Specialist: morale's in the dirt. hard to parse when you're this checked out.
burnt out. the numbers don't lie and neither do i.
Enabler: ...rough stretch. i could really use a win, team.
trying to stay positive but it's getting heavy.
Leader: i'm running on fumes. i need this guild to step up with me.
low right now. carrying morale and the key is a lot.
default: not feeling great about things lately.

Selfish: +{key} now. obviously. i've been hard-carrying us up here.
Wildcard: WE PUSHED TO +{key} LETS GOOOO {dungeon} fears us now
Specialist: clean enough for the triple-chest — +{key} on {dungeon}. trending up.
+{key}. numbers say we keep climbing. don't get cocky.
Enabler: +{key}! look at us go, team. so proud of this group.
Leader: +{key}. that's the standard now. we hold it.
pushed to +{key}. good. eyes up, keep climbing.

Selfish: ez. {dungeon} was free. i barely tried.
{dungeon} +{key} down. did i carry? i carried.
Wildcard: {dungeon} +{key} down, gg, i did nothing wrong for ONCE.
clean {dungeon} run, no notes, chaos averted today
Enabler: {dungeon} +{key}, that felt good — well played all.
Leader: timed, clean. that's how it should look.
